Recent files remain split out under MISC-013.

target_semantics: Compile configuration ahead of time and avoid writing compiled artifacts into the source tree.
divergence: none
notes: Nix compiles all 100 ASDF source components into an immutable FASL output before constructing the installed wrapper. A cold installed-wrapper launch reports that output, loads the complete configuration, and writes no FASLs into an empty user cache; direct development loads without an existing ASDF policy install a source-scoped XDG cache translation before loading the system.

target_semantics: Persist a deduplicated MRU of at most 300 recent files across editor processes and open it with M-g r.
divergence: none
notes: A pre-seeded oversized history is trimmed newest-first, index-reset, rewritten, and reloaded; reopening an older file then moves one entry to the front, Return opens it, and the bounded prompt shows local file metadata without changing the selected pathname.

target_semantics: Automatically persist modified bookmarks at exit and restore them in a fresh editor process.
divergence: none
notes: SPC b m and SPC RET retain Lem's native bookmark UI. Bookmark triples are bounded and validated inside the private non-evaluating state format, written atomically at clean exit, restored at startup, and reconciled by a baseline-aware three-way merge so stale processes preserve independent additions while local same-name updates and deletions win conflicts. The ncurses gate covers creation, point-accurate fresh-process jumps, concurrent mutation, reload idempotence, and malicious reader syntax.

target_semantics: Open M-x calc as a reusable Evil-compatible GNU-style RPN calculator with transactional digit entry, common stack and arithmetic operations, and exact origin restoration.
divergence: The configured everyday RPN surface is covered, but GNU Calc matrices and vectors, symbolic rewrite and algebra menus, units tables and custom definitions, programming, graphing, trail, embedded, and keypad interfaces are absent; qalc expression and output semantics can differ.
notes: The installed-wrapper ncurses gate physically invokes M-x calc and proves its compact bottom window, read-only Normal state, precision-12 and degree defaults, prompt Escape rollback, RPN arithmetic, algebraic unit conversion, stack motion, independent undo/redo, transcendental angle behavior, precision propagation, copy/yank, transactional evaluation failure, q origin restoration, and reusable session. Evaluator calls use bounded direct argv with expression, output, and time limits rather than a shell or Lisp reader.

target_semantics: Automatically protect newly visited programming, CSS/XML, and fundamental-equivalent files with a basic read-only wrapped mode when any line exceeds 10,000 bytes, with an explicit mode restore.
divergence: Lem measures decoded text as UTF-8 bytes and applies mitigation before original-mode activation rather than deferring invisible buffers after mode selection; GNU So Long's action menu, file/directory-local policy customization, manual action alternatives, longlines mode, and minor-mode-only actions are absent.
notes: The installed-wrapper ncurses gate physically invokes file visits, C-c C-c, and M-x global-so-long-mode; proves the strict 10,000-byte threshold and a multibyte case, programming/fundamental targets and text/Org exclusions, read-only wrapped presentation, absence of parser, LSP, lint, gutter, DAP, and Paredit activation, exact line-highlight restoration, original-mode restoration, future-visit toggle semantics, forced-save containment, user-toggle preservation across source reload, and reload-safe single hook ownership.

target_semantics: Before reading a newly visited readable local file strictly larger than 50 MiB, offer normal open, abort, or literal byte-oriented Fundamental mode.
divergence: Lem projects literal octets through Latin-1 characters instead of an Emacs unibyte buffer; temporary implementation reads bypass interactive prompting, literal-buffer revisit does not offer a representation-change question, help is concise, and remote files are outside Lem's local model.
notes: The installed-wrapper ncurses gate proves the production 52,428,800-byte default and single reload-safe pre-read hook, a strict reduced-threshold boundary, a visible prompt before content read, allocation-free n, ordinary decoded and hooked y, hook-free Fundamental l with invalid UTF-8 and CRLF bytes, exact literal save and external-revert byte round-trips, save-time mode containment, and the explicit temporary-read boundary.

target_semantics: Treat daily modal editing, leader bindings, completion, navigation, editing defaults, structural editing, and UI basics as the first acceptance tier.
divergence: Priority classification is planning metadata rather than runtime behavior.
notes: The behavior rows above carry the actionable dispositions and evidence.

target_semantics: Treat language tooling, VCS, notes, debugging, and AI entry points as the second acceptance tier.
divergence: Priority classification is planning metadata rather than runtime behavior.

divergence: Priority classification is planning metadata rather than runtime behavior.
